_doc: Engine registry ‚Äî SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for active engines. Session 7 v6 (2026-05-16) added per-engine `monitoring` block. portfolio_freshness_watchdog.py, shadow_dashboard.py, and portfolio_scheduler.py ALL derive their active-engine list from this file dynamically. To archive an engine: set `active: false` AND `mode: archived`. The monitoring block can be left in place (it will be ignored when active=false) or stripped. Either way the engine disappears from watchdog checks, the dashboard, and any scheduler job that references it via its `engine` field.
